# Version 3.119.1
> **Servicing update** · Released September 12, 2025 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.1)
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.1 ships 8 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Zlib to v1.3.0.1+** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3058](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3058))

## Bug Fixes

- **SKXamlCanvas must not be opaque on MacCatalyst** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) ([#3236](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3236))
- **Avoid initializing SKMetalView twice** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) ([#3256](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3256))
- **Test disposing GRContext does not crash for Metal backend** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) ([#3258](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3258))
- **Ed PostScriptName to SkTypeface** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@jonlipsky](https://github.com/jonlipsky) ([#3263](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3263))
- **UTC DateTime conversion** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) ([#3333](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3333))
- **Build EGL as win32 and GLESv2 as WASDK** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3338](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3338))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **SKAutoCanvasRestore avoid crash at Dispose when canvas was already disposed** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#3291](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3291))

## Platform

- **Hotfix metal for ios 15 and lower** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#3293](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3293))
- **Build the WinUI Interop as /MT** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3341](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3341))
